latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC1: 신규 계정 생성 후 accounts.oracle_points = 100
latestValidationChecks.evidence: Default 100 set in schema; getPoints returns 100 for new user confirmed by test

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC2: 잔액 10pt 미만 시 insufficient_points 에러 반환
latestValidationChecks.evidence: deductPoint uses WHERE constellation_points >= 10; routes.js early guard returns insufficient_points; test user with 5pt correctly got the error

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC3: 신탁 전송 성공 시 -10pt 및 point_transactions 레코드 생성
latestValidationChecks.evidence: deductPoint atomically deducts 10pt and inserts delta=-10, reason='oracle_send' into point_transactions; test confirmed

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC4: 경기 우승 시 +50pt, win_bonus 레코드 생성
latestValidationChecks.evidence: awardMatchEndPoints awards WIN_REWARD=50 with reason='win_bonus' for placement=1; test confirmed +50pt and transaction record

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC5: 로그인 시 당일 첫 1회만 +10pt (중복 방지)
latestValidationChecks.evidence: grantDailyBonus queries same-day daily_login record before awarding; second call returns null without modifying balance; both paths tested

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC6: WS points_update 이벤트 즉시 전달
latestValidationChecks.evidence: broadcastToUser added to room-manager; called from deductPoint/awardPoints/grantDailyBonus; initial points_update sent on join_match; test confirmed event fired with numeric points value

validationChecks.criterion: AC1: 신규 계정 생성 후 accounts.oracle_points = 100 확인
validationChecks.evidence: users.constellation_points already defaults to 100 per 001_initial_schema.sql; test confirmed getPoints returns 100 for new user

validationChecks.criterion: AC2: 포인트 10pt 미만 상태에서 신탁 전송 시 insufficient_points 에러 반환
validationChecks.evidence: deductPoint uses WHERE constellation_points >= ORACLE_COST (10); returns { error: 'insufficient_points' } when row count is 0; oracle/routes.js early guard also checks < 10 and returns insufficient_points; test user with 5pt correctly got the error

validationChecks.criterion: AC3: 신탁 전송 성공 시 잔액 -10pt, point_transactions 레코드 생성
validationChecks.evidence: deductPoint deducts 10pt atomically and inserts into point_transactions with delta=-10, reason='oracle_send', match_id set; test confirmed balance drop and transaction record

validationChecks.criterion: AC4: 경기 우승 시 +50pt, point_transactions에 win_bonus 레코드 생성
validationChecks.evidence: awardMatchEndPoints awards WIN_REWARD=50 with reason='win_bonus' for placement=1; awardPoints logs to point_transactions; test confirmed +50pt and transaction

validationChecks.criterion: AC5: 로그인 시 당일 첫 1회만 +10pt (재로그인 시 중복 지급 없음)
validationChecks.evidence: grantDailyBonus queries point_transactions for same-day daily_login record before awarding; second call returns null without modifying balance; both paths tested and passed

validationChecks.criterion: AC6: WS points_update 이벤트가 포인트 변동 즉시 클라이언트에 전달됨
validationChecks.evidence: broadcastToUser added to room-manager; called from deductPoint, awardPoints, grantDailyBonus; ws/server.js sends initial points_update on join_match with userId; test confirmed event fired with numeric points value
